title: Rich Smoky Norwegian Bean Sprouts Skillet
description: A smoky and juicy Norwegian dish featuring bean sprouts, perfect for a date night, and is ovo-vegetarian-friendly. It combines the flavors of smoked paprika and poached eggs with the crunch of bean sprouts.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the bean sprouts and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
In a separate pot, bring the water to a boil and poach the eggs.
Season the bean sprouts with salt and black pepper.
To serve, place the cooked bean sprouts in a bowl and top with a poached egg.
